utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan contains all 5 of these items, each fully specified with coverage details and costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental health with a monthly cost. Property coverage includes home/contents and cost. Travel coverage includes travel insurance and cost. Additional services include enhancement services and cost. Total budget provides monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 required items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: (1) health_coverage with provider 'LifeFirst' covering both physical and mental health. The ground truth lists 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under both physical_health and mental_health, each rated 8. (2) property_coverage with provider 'PrimeHome', matching 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' rated 10. (3) travel_coverage with provider 'PrimeTravel', matching 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' rated 10. (4) additional_services with provider 'LifeFirst Concierge', which corresponds to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (concierge, advisor, priority claims, gym reimbursement, wellness) rated 10. Therefore, the plan maps to: LifeFirst Standard Plan (8), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (10), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (10), and Premium Insurance Membership (10).
